what: Run audit on the newly created knowledge entry

output.console: Audit result summary with pass/fail status and findings

success_handling.criteria: Audit returns a structured result (currently a stub returning success)

event.message: Audit completed for newly created entry

error_handling.criteria: The audit action returns an error
error_handling.action: Log audit failure as warning, do not block creation since the file is already written

event.message: Audit failed for entry {entry_id}, creation still succeeded

decisions.reason: Use local stub instead of flow_call to knowledge-audit
decisions.rationale: The full knowledge-audit flow is too heavyweight for inline use during create. A local stub returns success; will be replaced with a lightweight audit call later.
